titleStmt.title: SII 18.434: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 434. (B.K. No. 14 of 1933-34.) BAṄKĀPUR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone set up against the front wall of the Dāsāji-maṭha.

summary.p: This record is dated in Śaka 1565, Svabhānu, Jyēshṭha śu. 1 corresponding to A.D. 1643, May 8, Monday.

It states that on account of certain fines imposed on the peasants (Okkalu-makkaḷu) of the village Bhadrāpura, they vacated the village. Consequently the village became deserted and so Dēśayi Buḷḷappa, the gauḍa of Bhadrāpura brought them back and rehabilitated them. For this act, he was granted a gift of land by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. 0 . śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraśuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē .
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . 1 . svasti śrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1565 neya svabhānusaṁvacarada jyē
ṣṭa śudha 1 dallū . bhadrāpurada haḷemokhāsiya Ā grāmada vakkalu
makkaḷa kaiya daṁḍava koṁḍa saṁmaṁdha yallā biṭṭu hōgi Ūru haḷā
gi yiralāgi Ā bhadrāpurada gauḍanādaṁthā baṁkāpurada sīmeya
dēśāyi buḷḷappanu Ā vakkalumakkaḷa karattaṁdu Ūrattuṁbi
da saṁmaṁdha Ā grāmada gauḍanadaṁthā dēśāyi buḷappage Ārasu
bhu koṭa manyada hollavu makkaḷu makkaḷu paraṁpara Eṁdu koṭa
du sukadalli yihadu yeṁdu koṭṭa manye .
Digital edition of SII 18.434 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
